brief: Domain spotlight (playstyle / strategy) for the Anemos realm in VOIDBORN. Explain how Anemos decks win: unit roles (flying units, storm magic, harpies, whispering spirits, hurricane weavers), curve tips, synergies, and when to pick this realm for ranked. Visual identity: storm-wracked sky, wind spirits, ethereal purple lightning, harpies and cloud sanctuaries. Practical TCG advice without inventing fake card names — speak in archetypes (tanks, burn, flying, etc.). Instagram hooks players who main Anemos; Facebook longer strategy discussion; Discord bullet tips + [Play VOIDBORN](https://voidborn.fun).

image.prompt: Cinematic square 1:1 shot of a crumbling floating citadel amidst a violent purple thunderstorm, ethereal lightning striking stone towers, harpy silhouettes soaring through turbulent wind currents, hyper-detailed dark fantasy art style.
